---
title: Cloud No Longer a Silver Bullet, Edge to the Rescue
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Gu-Yeon Wei
- David Brooks
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://arxiv.org/abs/1802.05943
journ: arXiv
year: 2018
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 19
---
